title: trichodesma mudgalii
intro: Trichodesma mudgalii, also known as Gokhru or Tribulus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Capparaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Trichodesma mudgalii include the ability to help manage blood pressure, improve kidney function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trichodesma mudgalii include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its various health benefits.
